title: DocuMCP Observability
description: Traces, logs, and RED metrics for the DocuMCP Go stack (database, search, worker pool)

panels.title: Request Rate
panels.description: Requests per second (server + internal spans)

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Server errors per second

panels.title: Request Latency
panels.description: P50, P95, P99 latency for server spans

panels.title: Requests by Route
panels.description: Top routes by request rate with error % and P95 latency

panels.title: Slowest Routes (P95)
panels.description: Top 10 routes by P95 latency

panels.title: SQL Query Rate
panels.description: SQL operations per second by type

panels.title: SQL Latency (P95)
panels.description: P95 latency for SQL queries by type

panels.title: Redis Command Rate
panels.description: Redis operations per second by command

panels.title: External Service Calls
panels.description: Outbound HTTP (Kiwix) and Git operation rates

panels.title: Redis Latency (P95)
panels.description: P95 latency for Redis commands

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (span_name, le) (rate(traces_spanmetrics_latency_bucket{service="documcp", span_kind="SPAN_KIND_CLIENT", span_name=~"[a-z]+"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Git & HTTP Latency (P95)
panels.description: P95 latency for Git operations and outbound HTTP calls

panels.title: DB Connection Pool
panels.description: PostgreSQL connection pool: open, in-use, and idle connections

panels.title: DB Connection Wait
panels.description: Rate of connections waited for and cumulative wait time

panels.title: Redis Connection Pool
panels.description: Redis connection pool: active, idle, hits, misses, and timeouts

panels.title: Active Connections
panels.description: Currently active HTTP connections

panels.title: Document Count
panels.description: Total documents managed

panels.title: HTTP Requests (Native)
panels.description: Request rate from native Prometheus counter by method

panels.title: Search Latency
panels.description: P50, P95, P99 search query latency

panels.title: Queue Job Rate
panels.description: Jobs dispatched, completed, and failed per second by type

panels.title: Queue Job Duration (P95)
panels.description: P95 job execution time by type

panels.title: Hop Latency (P95)
panels.description: P95 server-side latency for each hop in the request chain

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (client, server, le) (rate(traces_service_graph_request_server_seconds_bucket{client=~"DocuMCP|documcp"}[$__rate_interval]) or rate(traces_service_graph_request_server_seconds_bucket{server=~"DocuMCP|documcp"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Edge Request Rate
panels.description: Request rate for each service-to-service edge in the topology

panels.title: Edge Error Rate
panels.description: Failed requests per second for each service edge

panels.title: Recent Traces
panels.description: Recent traces from Tempo — click trace ID to explore full span tree

panels.title: Service Map
panels.description: Service dependency graph for DocuMCP stack derived from Tempo service graph metrics

panels.title: Log Volume by Level
panels.description: Log lines per second grouped by severity

panels.title: Recent Logs
panels.description: DocuMCP application logs with trace correlation links
